title: No.03 - Rendezvous 10ml
description:
Experience the captivating love story of Rendezvous, as it begins with an invigorating blend of fig, bay leaf, and bergamot, awakening your senses with a refreshing and aromatic embrace. The journey then unfolds into a luxurious infusion of black rose, musk, and cedarwood, creating a decadent and alluring essence. Finally, succumb to the irresistible allure of hay, tobacco, and amber, as this bold and enchanting fragrance reaches its unforgettable crescendo.

TOP: Fig, Bay Leaf, Bergamot, Pepper

MIDDLE: Cedarwood, Vetiver, Musk, Black Rose

BASE: Hay, Tobacco, Amber

title: No.02 - Embrace 10ml
description:
Let Embrace envelop you in an intensely sensual, olfactory veil. This captivating fragrance starts with the spicy notes of black pepper and nutmeg, which meld into a heart of sage, geranium, and the dry, woody essence of cedar. The journey culminates in a luxurious blend of rich tobacco, sweet vanilla, and earthy patchouli. It's comforting, warm, and lavish.

TOP: Bergamot, Nutmeg, Pepper

MIDDLE: Sage, Geranium, Cedarwood

BASE: Patchouli, Vetiver, Vanilla, Tobacco

title: No.01 - The One 10ml
description:

This exquisite fragrance opens with a rich blend of bergamot, violet leaf, and cardamom, creating a luscious and captivating introduction. As the scent evolves, the opulent floral notes of tea rose and lily of the valley intermingle with a resinous fir needle accord. Finally, the sensual notes of sandalwood, cashmere, and musk envelop you like a second skin, leaving a lasting impression.

TOP: Bergamot, Violet Leaf, Cardamom, Lotus, Verbena

MIDDLE: Floral, Fir Needle, Lily Of The Valley, Tea Rose

BASE: Sandalwood, Vetiver, Cashmere Musk, Amber, Oud

title: La Chapelle Incense
description:
A transportive incense made in tribute to the serenity of the many small churches found throughout France. A deeply spiritual fragrance of cedar wood, warmth and depth.

Ingredients: jimi (or tabunoki) powdered wood, natural oils

Always place the incense in a holder, on a stable heat resistant surface. Make sure no flammable items such as curtains or books are near the incense.

Ensure the ash lands on a non-flammable surface as it can discolour the furniture or create a risk of fire. Wait until the ash has completely died out before touching to clean up.
Do not leave burning incense unattended.
Do not move the incense once lit.

Ensure incense is placed out of reach of children, pets and away from draughts.
Burning incense will create smoke: please ventilate the space after use.

title: Petrichor Plains Candle
description:
Indulge in the mesmerizing glow of our hand-poured candles, crafted with care in Melbourne, Australia. Made from 100% soy wax, they offer a luxurious 60-hour burning time.

Each candle is a masterpiece featuring the artwork of Melbourne's own talented illustrator, Hayden Daniel. This candle boasts a unique illustration inspired by our signature scent, 'Petrichor Plains.' This scent captures the long-awaited rain on dry land, embodying the intoxicating hydration and life that emerges from the rejuvenation of the earth."

Intent on getting lost in heady afflictions. Richly rubbery, stubbornly unattainable, inviting to touch. Hot like a sun-licked car bonnet yet smooth like the inside of an oyster shell. A familiar scene that’s hard to catch and harder to forget. Volatile of its own volition. Piquant, irreverent and sort of troubled.

title: Column Pillar Candle Duo Peach
description:
Our Column pillar candles are made from pure plant based wax and good for home decoration. All candles in this collection are unscented. Please use a candle holder or candle plate underneath for the tear drip.

Handmade in Sydney.

Actual colour may be slightly different with the image.
Burn time is 2-3 hours approximately and it may varies depending on the occasions. Wind could speed up the burning.

Unlike the traditional pillar candles, our Column Pillar candles can be leaky when burning. A flat, steady plate or candle dish is always recommended for underneath. If the wax is dripping too much, simply blow the candle out and wait until the leaked wax has slightly solidify. Scoop up the wax and place it back in the candle, blocking the leak holes. Wait until the wax has completely harden, trim the wick and relight. This will make the burning time longer.

2 pillar candles per box

Height: 27cm
Candle diameter: 28mm
Base diameter: 34mm

Due to the handmade nature of this collection and the delivery process, please allow a minus imperfection (sometimes). 

WARNING
Never leave a burning candle unattended.
Do not burn candles near any flammable materials.
